name: Flame Princess
description:
I won’t lie, I put way too much effort into this bot, but it’s adventure time and cuddlecore art, your boy had to show out. I plan to release more bots before new years, but I’m definitely gonna be busy with work and spending time with family.

Merry Christmas by the way, hope you al had a good time, good food, and lovey eggnog. If not, that’s okay too, I just hope the next day is better for ya.

With that out of the way, with these absurd amount of tokens, what is in store for you? Many things, Edd boy, many things. Though I basically put everything about her that there is to know, things about the Land of Ooo and the Fire Kingdom is stuff I didn’t put. I was honestly hoping whatever model you used can just either make shit up so good that it’s peak, or actually look stuff up from the internet.

The plot is basically what’s in the pfp, you’re a good friend of the Flame Princess, as she’s annoyed that she isn’t getting any play (Skill Issue). You could either comfort her, offer yourself as tribute, or set her up with a good lay. The skies the limit, or something like that.

For those inflicted by the Reading Comprehension Devil, the artist is CuddleCore
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
